relationship_description: AI applications run on top of foundation models.
Models are trained and served via inference platforms.
Frontier model labs rent capacity from hyperscalers.
Some labs use specialized GPU clouds.
Models depend on licensed and labeled training data.
Hyperscalers operate or lease physical DCs.
Hyperscalers procure GPUs and ASICs at scale.
Hyperscalers contract massive PPAs.
Neoclouds buy GPUs for rental.
Neoclouds lease space from DC REITs and hyperscale builders.
All AI accelerators are made in fabs.
AI accelerators with HBM require advanced packaging.
AI accelerators integrate HBM memory.
AI accelerators integrate networking silicon.
AI accelerators are designed by fabless / IDM teams.
Chip design requires EDA tools.
Chip design relies on licensed IP cores.
Accelerators require leading-edge fabrication.
Modern data-center GPUs integrate HBM stacks.
GPUs are made on 5nm and below.
Leading GPUs are CoWoS packaged.
Hyperscaler ASICs use HBM for memory bandwidth.
Hyperscaler ASICs use advanced packaging.
Fabs require capital equipment for every step.
Fabs consume tons of high-purity chemicals.
Fabs consume bulk and specialty gases.
Fabs run on silicon wafers from polysilicon feedstock.
Fabs depend on photoresists for patterning.
Fabs depend on neon and other noble gases.
Fabs consume hundreds of MW each.
Fabs require ultra-pure water at scale.
Leading-edge nodes require EUV.
Leading-edge nodes require advanced resists.
Leading-edge nodes require advanced deposition.
Leading-edge nodes require advanced etch.
Yield management requires advanced metrology.
Advanced packaging is wafer-level fabrication.
Packaging requires bonders; dicers; grinders.
CoWoS is performed in TSMC fabs.
HBM stacks are DRAM dies fabbed at advanced nodes.
HBM requires precise stacking and bonding.
Future HBM generations rely on hybrid bonding.
DUV / EUV light sources use neon and other noble gases.
EUV scanners require ZEISS reflective optics.
EUV laser-produced-plasma sources use noble gases.
ArF excimer lasers require neon as buffer / discharge gas.
DUV scanners pattern through DUV photoresist.
DRAM and NAND are made in fabs.
Memory fabs use the same equipment vendors.
Modern DRAM uses EUV at advanced layers.
Switch ASICs are fabbed at leading edges.
Optical engines require advanced silicon photonics.
Silicon photonics uses silicon wafers.
Servers integrate accelerators.
Servers integrate NICs and switches.
AI servers integrate liquid cooling and heat sinks.
DC operations require power.
DCs connect via interconnection processes.
DC builds need specialty contractors.
DCs need land and rights of way.
DC siting needs permits.
DC cooling consumes water.
DCs need specialized operations staff.
DC builds require transformers and switchgear.
Specialty trades constrain build pace.
Internal DC power gear consumes copper.
Inside-the-fence transformers use GOES.
Modern lithium UPS systems use battery cells.
Transformers use grain-oriented electrical steel cores.
Transformer windings use copper.
Some transformer windings and cables use aluminum.
Transmission and distribution wiring consumes large copper volumes.
HV transmission cables use aluminum.
Substation transformers use GOES.
Backup gensets use diesel or natural gas.
Cooling tower and adiabatic cooling use water.
Liquid cold plates use copper-based heat exchangers.
Thermal generation requires fuel.
Nuclear plants require enriched uranium fuel.
LWRs receive fabricated fuel assemblies.
SMRs require HALEU enrichment.
Conversion / enrichment depends on mined uranium.
Gas-fired plants depend on industrial gas turbines.
Gas-fired plants depend on natural gas.
Wind turbines use NdFeB magnets in some designs.
BESS uses lithium battery cells.
Some battery chemistries use nickel.
Some battery chemistries use cobalt.
Battery anodes use graphite.
Some power semiconductors use gallium-based materials.
Some compound semis use germanium.
Advanced-node interconnects use tungsten.
Fabs use helium for cooling and atmosphere control.
Cz silicon pulling uses high-purity quartz crucibles.
Fluorochemistry inputs trace back to fluorspar.
Resist chemistry uses specialty fluorinated and other gases.
Merchant noble-gas supply includes neon.
Merchant gas supply includes helium.
NdFeB magnets are made from rare-earth oxides.
Rare-earth refining is concentrated in China.
Gallium refining is China-dominant.
Germanium refining is China-dominant.
Tungsten refining is China-dominant.
Graphite refining is China-dominant.
Construction depends on cleared interconnection.
DC builds require multi-billion-dollar project finance.
Hyperscaler capex programs require leases and debt.
Power-plant builds need specialty labor.
Nuclear ops require specialized engineering and operators.
Gas plants face air-permit and ISO clearance.
Fabs need experienced process engineers and technicians.
AI export controls condition who can buy advanced chips.
Fab subsidies and export controls condition the network.
